# goober-autoprefixer A css autoprefixer for [🥜goober](https://github.com/cristianbote/goober) using [style-vendorizer](https://github.com/kripod/style-vendorizer). ## Install `npm install --save goober` ## How to use it This packages exports a `prefix` function that needs to be passed to goober's `setup` function like this: ```jsx import React from 'react'; import { setup } from 'goober'; import { prefix } from 'goober/prefixer'; // Setup goober for react with autoprefixer setup(React.createElement, prefix); ```
